title: Cognitive Firewall Instruments — authoring defensive instruments against AI-mediated analytic corruption
public_claim: An instrument design surface for turning the capstone's cognitive-firewall idea into usable checks.
distinctive_mechanism: It moves from scenario, evidence packet, analytic method, output, failure-mode tag, pattern card, countermeasure proposal, and export record without losing provenance.
